title: mammea neurophylla
intro: Mammea neurophylla is a plant species that belongs to the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the Calophyllaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mammea neurophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
